text_excerpt: In Parliament | Lewis Cocking Skip to main content Lewis Cocking MP Main navigation Home About Me News My Priorities In Parliament Contact Surgeries Lewis Cocking MP In Parliament Tweet How I'm representing you in Parliament. News Will changes to SEND deliver fairer funding for Broxbourne? Wednesday, 25 February, 2026 The Department for Education have published their plans to change the special educational needs system. Youth Unemployment Monday, 2 February, 2026 The number of young people who are not in education, employment or training is at its highest level for more than a decade. Keir Starmer's message to Broxbourne Tuesday, 9 December, 2025 Challenging the Prime Minister on his decision to punish those in work. Will the Prime Minister tackle roadworks? Wednesday, 26 November, 2025 My Question to Keir Starmer. Demanding action on flooding Wednesday, 17 September, 2025 Flooding is a huge concern for people in Stanstead Abbotts and across Broxbourne. We must keep the Chagos Islands Tuesday, 16 September, 2025 My speech on the second reading of the Bill that would see the Chagos Islands, which is the site of an important UK military base, be transferred to Mauritius. Celebrating Hearts for Herts Charity in Parliament Tuesday, 2 September, 2025 Paying tribute to a Hoddesdon-based charity in Parliament. When will the Government close the Cheshunt asylum hotel? Monday, 1 September, 2025 Challenging the Home Secretary. Demanding the closure of the asylum hotel in Cheshunt Tuesday, 22 July, 2025 I have always opposed the hotel in Cheshunt being used to house illegal asylum seekers. One year as your MP Friday, 4 July, 2025 Looking back on my first 12 months. Load More In Parliament Westminster Trips What can an MP do?
